name: Rich Duchess Potatoes (Uses Potato Puree)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F. Grease and flour a large baking sheet.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together the potato puree, butter, egg beaters, oregano, salt, and pepper until smooth and creamy.
3. Beat for about 2 to 3 minutes.
4. Transfer the mixture to a pastry bag.
5. Pipe onto the prepared baking sheet in two "S" shapes stacked on top of one another.
6. Bake for 15 minutes or until heated through and browned. Makes 6 servings, each with 94 calories, 2g protein, 4g fat, and 51mg cholesterol.
